LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
      constructors:

With.Bool:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Bool
      constructors:
        r#false (0 arg(s))
        r#true (0 arg(s))

With.List:
  mutual inductive(s):
    List
      constructors:
        Ֆ5bՖՖ5dՖ (0 arg(s))
        Ֆ_Ֆ3aՖՖ3aՖ_ (2 arg(s))

With.filter:
  constant declaration:
    body: μrec [0] :=
            0: λ _ _ _ →
                 case<With.List{0},0> @0 of
                   λ<[]> With.List{0}{0}
                   λ<[_, _]>
                     λ _ _ _ _ _ →
                       case<With.Bool{0},0> @1 of
                         λ<[]> @10 □ @3 @0
                         λ<[]> With.List{0}{1} @2 (@10 □ @3 @0)
                       @4
                       @3
                       @1
                       (@3 @1)
                       @0

With.xs:
  constant declaration:
    body: With.List{0}{1} With.Bool{0}{0}
            (With.List{0}{1} With.Bool{0}{1}
               (With.List{0}{1} With.Bool{0}{0} With.List{0}{0}))

With.test:
  constant declaration: body: With.filter □ (λ _ → @0) (With.xs)
main program: [With.test]
